title: スワンSの後に・強くおっきく！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I felt so relaxed while running, but I was able to
zoom by so fast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everyone around me was piping hot with passion,
like lasagna fresh out of the oven!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope I can run just as well as I did today at the
Mile Ch.! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she didn't have any issue running a
1,400-meter graded race, I doubt she'll have any
issues at the Mile Ch.
choice_data_list: We've got one month left! Let's make it count!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up for us is the Mile Ch., the biggest event
in fall where the best gather to race!
